title: Welsh Pilaf Noodle Bake
description: A comforting, creamy noodle bake with a hint of Welsh flavor. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt buttery over medium heat.
Add Welsh pilaf and cook until lightly toasted, about 5 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked noodles, pilaf mixture, and a pinch of salt.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
